name: golang-github-kevinburke-ssh-config-dev
title: golang-github-kevinburke-ssh-config-dev
description:
Go parser for ssh_config files
ssh_config This is a Go parser for ssh_config files. Importantly,
this parser attempts to preserve comments in a given file, so you can
manipulate a ssh_config file from a program, if your heart desires.
.
It's designed to be used with the excellent x/crypto/ssh
(https://golang.org/x/crypto/ssh) package, which handles SSH negotiation
but isn't very easy to configure.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-kevinburke-ssh-config-dev because Go parser for ssh_config files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-kevinburke-ssh-config-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-kevinburke-ssh-config-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-kevinburke-ssh-config-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
